results.claim: The Social Security System (SSS) has released the payout schedule for the 13th-month benefits and monthly pensions of eligible members.
Former US President George W. Bush said that the Philippines was the “wealthiest country in the world” a week after the September 11, 2001, terrorist attack at the World Trade Center.
A video of Pope Francis shows him talking about the “end time prophecy,” where he urges people not to look up to him anymore.
Kagagaling lang ng Filipinas sa Ikalawang Digmaang Pandaigdig nang maging pangulo si Ferdinand Marcos.

President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. will allegedly open the Fuji Bank account of his father, former president Ferdinand E. Marcos, during his official working visit to Japan. The video shows a clip of Marcos giving his departure statement before heading to Japan.
Philippine opposition Senator Leila de Lima was rushed to the hospital, as shown in what appears to be a screenshot of a live television news report.

Sinisisi ng ilan sa 1986 EDSA People Power ang pagpataw ng VAT. Ayon sa mga pag-aaral, ipinataw ng administrasyong Aquino ang VAT dahil sa matinding krisis sa ekonomiya na idinulot ng rehimeng Marcos.
Counting of votes for the national elections will only start after polls close at 7pm today, contrary to a claim showing presidential aspirant Leni Robredo leading the tally of votes.
The Philippines had a consulate in every country in the world, but the buildings housing them were all sold in 1986 during the administration of then-president Corazon Aquino.
Eating one malunggay seed every day is an effective cure for over 300 diseases.

CLAIM: Vice President Leni Robredo is not a victim of fake news.
RATING: FALSE

After ex-Philippine leader Rodrigo Duterte was handed over to the International Criminal Court (ICC) in The Hague, an image was shared in Chinese posts that falsely claimed it showed local troops warning they would “lead an attack on Manila” if the China-friendly former president failed to return. There have been no reports of Philippine soldiers threatening violence in the country in the wake of the former president’s arrest, and the image used in the false posts has circulated since October 2017, when Duterte was still president.
Former president Ferdinand E. Marcos became finance secretary during the administration of president Manuel Roxas.

Administrasyon ni Ferdinand Marcos Sr., at hindi ni Corazon Aquino, ang nagpasimula ng kontraktwalisasyon sa Pilipinas. Nilagdaan ni Marcos noong 1974 ang Presidential Decree No. 442 o Labor Code of the Philippines na nagbigay ng probisyon para sa mga employer na gawing probationary ang kanilang mga manggagawa.
The Commission on Audit (COA) has not found deficiencies in the Office of the Vice President (OVP)’s spending in 2023.

Founded in 2017, Fact Check Philippines is a coalition of independent groups and individuals with one common goal — to aid in combating fake news and misinformation. It is the country's first established citizen fact checking organization.
Medyo malaki na raw ang gastos ni Sen. Imee Marcos ‘di pa man naguumpisa ang campaign period para sa 2025 local and national elections.
Sen. Imee Marcos was sentenced to life imprisonment after she was sued by President Ferdinand Marcos.
Ipinahayag na ni Senador Imee Marcos ang presidential-vice presidential tandem nina dating senador Bongbong Marcos and Davao City Mayor Sara Duterte para sa halalan sa 2022.
A video claims that Indonesia is preparing to defend itself against attacks by China, with a column of tanks seen driving down a street.

Ang Kontra Daya ay isang malawakang kampanya ng iba’t ibang organisasyon at mga indibidwal na sinisiyasat ang mga kaganapan tuwing eleksyon upang ireport ang anumang anomalya, abuso, at pandaraya. Nabuo ito noong 2007 nang pumutok ang ‘Hello Garci’ controversy ni dating pangulong Gloria Macapagal-Arroyo.

Sa kabilang banda, si Assoc. Prof. Danilo Arao naman ay senior staff ng IBON Foundation noong 1999 na naging Editor-in-Chief at Research Head pa sa mga sumunod na taon habang siya ay nagtuturo sa De La Salle University at University of the Philippines.
Nabuksan ang PGH nuong 1910, samantalang nakumpleto ang Manila International Airport nuong 1961, bago pa man maupo sa pwesto si FM Sr.
Susubukan umanong guluhin ng mga makakaliwang grupo ang inagurasyon ni Ferdinand Marcos Jr. ngayong Huwebes, Hunyo 30.

Another erroneous online article claimed President-elect Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. wants returning senator Alan Peter Cayetano replaced, this time by Rep. Rodante Marcoleta. It is a false claim.
Noon pang 1948 lumipat ang maraming akademikong yunit ng Unibersidad ng Pilipinas sa Diliman, Quezon City. Samantalang, 1965 lang naging pangulo si Marcos Sr.
Claim: The International Criminal Court (ICC) will release former president Rodrigo Duterte from detention in The Hague, Netherlands, because the ICC has lost jurisdiction over the case.
Kumalat ang graphic na nagsasabing nangunguna na sa bilangan si Bongbong Marcos habang bukas pa ang mga polling precinct at bumuboto pa ang mga tao.
On February 28, President Rodrigo Duterte ordered that Smartmatic be replaced as the country’s vote-counting machine (VCM) provider.

Kumakalat pa rin ang pekeng kuwento na nagpuslit umano ng tone-toneladang ginto patungong Thailand ang administrasyon ni dating Pangulong Noynoy Aquino. Peke ang dokumentong galing umano sa Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas.
The ICC dismissed drug war charges against Duterte
The International Criminal Court has dismissed the crimes against humanity case against former president Rodrigo Duterte.
Dual degree raw ang certificate na ibinigay ng Oxford University kay Bongbong Marcos
Leni Robredo defended Sara Duterte over her office’s alleged misuse of confidential funds.

President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has completely recovered his family’s wealth following a court verdict dismissing an ill-gotten wealth case against his parents, former president Ferdinand E. Marcos and former first lady Imelda R. Marcos.
Miss Universe Organization (MOU) president Paula Shugart says Miss Mexico is undeserving to be 69th Miss Universe.
Tatlong mayors na sa Camarines Sur ang itinangging sinusuportahan nila si Bongbong Marcos, taliwas sa ipinakalat ng Partido Federal ng Pilipinas.
Base sa ilang desisyon ng Korte Suprema, hindi napatunayan ng mga Marcos na mula sa mga lehitimong source at hindi nakaw ang kanilang yaman.

CLAIM: 2016 vice presidential election was stolen from Marcos
RATING: FALSE

Ayon sa isang facebook post, binabalewala diumano ni presidential candidate VP Leni Robredo ang mga pagsisikap ng Maritime Industry Authority (MARINA) sa pagsasanay sa mga marino. Ito ay tinanggal sa konteksto mula sa orihinal na pahayag ni Robredo hinggil sa disconnect ng curriculum at industry sa bansa.
An anonymous Facebook user has falsely claimed that Pasig City mayoral candidate Sarah Discaya leads the race against incumbent Mayor Vico Sotto by 349 votes, before the vote counting even begins.
All public school students, including those in college, who will graduate in 2024 are eligible for P8,000 cash assistance from the Department of Education (DepEd).

A clip of President Ferdinand Marcos posted on social media supposedly ordering the teaching of masturbation to four-year-olds was taken out of context. The president was actually opposing such inclusions in sex education in his full statement.
The International Criminal Court (ICC) has already released former president Rodrigo Duterte from detention. He is now back in the Philippines.
A video showing police beating some passengers inside a train in Hong Kong is being shared online, claiming that is the situation in that country due to the coronavirus.
Vice President Leni Robredo suggests “inhaling cough back” to prevent the spread of the 2019 novel coronavirus.
Billionaires from Southeast Asia and Europe have allied themselves with President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. because of the family’s hidden wealth.

A video showing a packed arena circulated in TikTok and Facebook posts claiming it showed a rally for Ferdinand Marcos Jr. In reality, the video shows a corporate event in 2019. The company told AFP it was unrelated to Marcos Jr's campaign.
The Philippines’ economic growth rates were 3.7%, 3.2%, and 4.2% from 2010 to 2016.
Sandro Marcos, son of presidential aspirant Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr., says all the Marcoses who are running in the 2022 elections will win without campaigning.
E-commerce company Shopee Philippines is giving away 100,000 pieces of iPhone 12 Pro Max.
Tech billionaire Elon Musk has officially bought the media network Fox News.
A Filipino living in America cured himself of COVID-19 after drinking a glass of water with a teaspoon of salt.
A YouTube video posted by “Viral TV” falsely claimed that Sen. Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa has been apprehended by officials from the International Criminal Court and brought to the Netherlands.
Vice President Leni Robredo and reelectionist Quezon City Mayor Joy Belmonte have not joined forces, contrary to a claim made by AnaKalusugan party-list Rep. Mike Defensor.
A video shows Antarctica is an “ice wall” surrounding a flat Earth.
Itinanggi ng Team Leni Robredo na namigay ng pera ang volunteer groups nina VP Leni Robredo at Senador Kiko Pangilinan.
The British Royal Navy handed over its warship HMS Dauntless to the Philippine Navy.
Cardiologist and online health personality Dr. Willie Ong, popularly known as Doc Willie, endorses ZB Gout Ointment Cream, a product claimed to cure gout, arthritis, rheumatism, and other body pains.

A graphic card circulating online claims that the International Criminal Court (ICC) has allowed former president Rodrigo Duterte to return to the Philippines after being detained for three months in The Hague, Netherlands. This is fake.
The report on 166 overseas Filipino workers testing positive for human immunodeficiency virus is recent.
Former US President Donald Trump’s suspected assassin was Chinese.
Video shows Ferdinand Marcos Sr. criticizing his son, Ferdinand Marcos Jr., for his supposed inability to understand the suffering of poor people.
An article preview image shows an image of a teacher who was supposedly raped and killed by 3 of her students who were under the influence of drugs.

Several posts are circulating on Facebook alleging that members of the House of Representatives were pressured to sign the impeachment complaints against Vice President Sara Duterte. This is not true.
A Facebook (FB) page misleadingly claims the modernization of the Dr. Jose Fabella Memorial Hospital (DJFMH) was an initiative of the administration of outgoing President Rodrigo Duterte.
SM malls were owned by the late president Ferdinand E. Marcos.
International Criminal Court (ICC) Prosecutor Karim Khan said in a video statement that former president Rodrigo Duterte is innocent of the crimes against humanity charge.
An old election campaign video of Vice President and presidential aspirant Leni Robredo was altered with the use of unrelated images to present misleading information about her.
Active members of the Philippine National Police (PNP) and Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) are no longer required to undergo drug tests, psychological tests, and psychiatric evaluations.
Hindi totoo ang sinabi sa isang post na most wanted ng PDEA ang bayaw ni Leni Robredo na si Butch Robredo dahil umano sa pagkakasangot nito sa ilegal na droga.
A false rumor that reelected Pasig City Mayor Vico Sotto got actress Atasha Muhlach pregnant–first circulated in 2024–has gone viral again on social media shortly after the May 12 midterm elections.

Sabi-sabi: Sa oras na mabawi ng kanyang panig mula sa Presidential Commission on Good Government (PCGG) ang yaman niya at mga gintong ipinahiram umano niya sa iba’t ibang mga bansa, makikinabang daw ang Pilipinas, ayon sa huling habilin at testamento ni dating pangulong Ferdinand E. Marcos.

A tsunami may hit several provinces in Mindanao after a 7.2. magnitude earthquake shook Davao Oriental
Misleading ang post hinggil sa patong-patong na kaso raw ni dating Vice President Leni Robredo dahil sa pagtatangkang patalsikin si Rodrigo Duterte.
A delivery rider was victimized by an unknown customer who booked for the delivery of a severed head.
The US and Australia sent troops and arms to the Philippines in January 2024.

A TikTok video spliced together two different clips to make it appear that presidential candidate and senator Manny Pacquiao’s solution to the slow internet speed in the Philippines is to believe in God. The circulating clip is fake.
Various Facebook posts warning of a looming earthquake “stronger than magnitude 8” contain links to a list of places susceptible to the quake.
Bongbong Marcos removed party-list lawmakers France Castro and Raoul Manuel from Congress
The Supreme Court, sitting as the Presidential Electoral Tribunal, did not junk the entire electoral protest filed by former senator Bongbong Marcos against Vice President Leni Robredo.
The face of Vice President Sara Duterte is not in the children’s book that she wrote titled, “Isang Kaibigan“.
The COVID-19 vaccines, specifically the ones that use mRNA, cause infertility.
News anchor Noli De Castro expressed support for former president Rodrigo Duterte, who was arrested and transferred to the International Criminal Court (ICC) over crimes against humanity charges.
Cardinal Luis Antonio Tagle was elected as the new pope.
Claim: Australian child Quaden Bayles “committed suicide” after bullying worsened in school.
GMA news anchor Jessica Soho vouches for the legitimacy of the weight loss supplement EcoFit.
All poll watchers have the right to take pictures of voter receipts, according to Comelec Resolution No. 11076.
TV5 broadcaster Raffy Tulfo’s license is to be revoked.
73 degrees Celsius (ºC) temperatures were recorded in Kuwait.

CLAIM: Vicky Belo supports the presidential bid of former senator Ferdinand Marcos Jr.
RATING: FALSE
The SIDC Connector Bridge was conceptualized and funded by the administration of former president Ferdinand Marcos Sr.
A video shows millions of bilih fish emerging from Lake Singkarak in West Sumatra, Indonesia, allowing people to catch them by hand.
Celebrity Amy Perez promoted a brand of bakuchiol retinol.

Several hours after polling precincts closed on May 9, a fabricated screenshot of an alleged report from GMA News went viral and showed Vice President Leni Robredo in a head-to-head race with Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. for the presidential seat.

Founded in 2017, Fact Check Philippines is a coalition of independent groups and individuals with one common goal — to aid in combating fake news and misinformation. It is the country's first established citizen fact checking organization.
Tropical cyclone Hanna entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) on August 12, and the weather bureau has already raised Signal No. 3.
Robredo not violating Comelec ban on campaigning

Several Facebook pages and groups have revived photos in 2016 of a tribute performance for a former spokesperson of the Communist Party of the Philippines-New People’s Army at the University of the Philippines Diliman to falsely imply the presence of the underground army on campus.
A message on Facebook Messenger warned Facebook users against receiving vaccinations from health centers.
